message:
fix(pass2.5): Use Pass 2.5 names for isinstance type checks in comprehensions

When generating isinstance(obj, Type) in list comprehensions, use
getZigNameSearchingUp to look up the type name, allowing nested classes
defined in parent scopes to be correctly resolved.

Example: [x for x in items if isinstance(x, X)] where X is a nested class
defined in the same method as the comprehension now correctly uses the
Pass 2.5 unique name (e.g., __v_test_issue_7959_X_54).

Note: This fix works for original methods but not for inherited methods
where in_unscoped_method=true (those don't have Pass 2.5 scopes).
